scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix packages/shared run build -- --watch" "npm --prefix apps/api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/shared run build && npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix packages/shared run lint && npm --prefix apps/api run lint && npm --prefix apps/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/shared run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/api run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck
